direction_conventions.multi_layer_swap: At every band layer, clamp current coefficients to the clean pass's swapped coefficients; preserve current orthogonal complement
direction_conventions.rms_gain_folded_sensitivity: normalize(J.T @ (lm_head[token] * final_rmsnorm_gain)); rank-equivalent to official lens.apply for Qwen
